title: MBOSE SSLC Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MBOSE SSLC Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Meghalaya Board of School Education (MBOSE) Result 2026 for SSLC Examination 2026 will be declared on the official website - mbose.in on 07-04-2026 at 11:00 AM. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MBOSE SSLC result.

content.text: Meghalaya Board of School Education has officially announced that the MBOSE SSLC Result 2026 for the Secondary School Leaving Certificate Examination 2026 will be declared tomorrow, 7th April 2026 (Tuesday) at 11:00 AM. MBOSE SSLC Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - mbose.in - and the complete result booklet(s) will be available for download from the board’s portal instead of being displayed physically at MBOSE offices in Tura or Shillong.

As per the press release issued from Tura on 2nd April 2026, students will be able to access their SSLC results through the official website www.mbose.in as well as other result partner websites such as mboseresults.in and megresults.nic.in using their exam details. MBOSE Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - mbose.in - so candidates are advised to keep their roll numbers ready, download their online marksheets once available, and carefully verify all particulars, contacting the board or their schools in case of any discrepancy.

The upcoming MBOSE SSLC Results 2026 declaration is for the Secondary School Leaving Certificate Examination 2026, conducted by the Meghalaya Board of School Education, Tura. According to the official press note, the board will publish the full result booklet online and will not display results at the MBOSE offices, encouraging students to use digital platforms for instant access.

MBOSE will host the SSLC 2026 result booklet(s) on its official website, and candidates can also use the listed partner websites to check their individual marks. The table below compiles the key URLs mentioned in the press release for quick access once the result is declared.

links.label: MBOSE SSLC Result 2026 - Official Result Portal / Booklet Download

sections.heading: How to Download MBOSE SSLC Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check your MBOSE SSLC Result 2026 once it is declared tomorrow at 11:00 AM:

items: Visit the official Meghalaya Board website https://www.mbose.in/ at or after 11:00 AM on 07-04-2026.
Look for the SSLC Examination 2026 Result link or result booklet download link on the homepage/notice section.
Alternatively, open mboseresults.in or megresults.nic.in if the main site is slow due to heavy traffic.
On the individual result portal, enter your Roll Number and other required details in the result login page, if such interface is provided.
Submit the details to view your subject wise marks, total marks and result status (Pass/Fail etc.).
If accessing the full result booklet PDF from mbose.in, open the booklet, search for your roll number and check your marks as printed.
Download or print the online result page or booklet entry for future reference, admission or scholarship purposes.

structured_links.label: MBOSE SSLC Result 2026 - Official Result Portal / Booklet Download
